news.t: Using ETFs to capture momentum during the market's wild swings
AllianceBernstein Launches Three New Active Equity ETFs on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: LOWV is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.03%, Apple at 6.35%, NVIDIA at 6.14%, Microsoft at 5.40%, and Broadcom at 4.57%.

overview.description: The AB US Low Volatility Equity ETF (LOWV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is a portfolio of large- and mid-cap US stocks, actively managed to pursue lower volatility than the broader market. The selection and weighting of holdings is based on the Issuers fundamental and quantitative research. LOWV was launched on Mar 22, 2023 and is issued by AB Funds.

data.title: Using ETFs to capture momentum during the market's wild swings
data.text: September's seasonal volatility could challenge the Big Tech trade, but one low-volatility ETF is still betting big on it.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Launches Three New Active Equity ETFs on NYSE Arca
